title: Saudi Arabian Lamb Flatbread
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb and flatbread. This recipe is a flavorful and aromatic combination of spices and herbs.

ingredients.name: Saudian spices
ingredients.notes: pre-mixed blend of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, mix together lamb, onion, garlic, and Saudian spices.
3. Form lamb mixture into 4-6 patties, depending on desired size.
4. Brush both sides of flatbread slices with olive oil.
5. Place flatbread slices on a baking sheet and top each with a lamb patty.
6. Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until lamb is cooked through.
7. Flip flatbread and lamb over halfway through cooking time.
8. Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
9. Serve warm, garnished with additional Saudian spices if desired.
